issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: button-with-pill-variant
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fully satisfy the rubric, defining the pill variant, compound variant, default variants, and using cn to merge classes.

scenarios.name: badge-with-error-border
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric requirements, while Response A fails to set the required defaultVariants ('active', 'md').
